top_signals.title: PepsiCo warns of ‘rising inflationary pressures’ for US consumers
top_signals.summary: Recovery in sales volumes runs out of steam in second quarter as surge in fuel costs hits snack and soda group
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chipmakers Boost Stocks as Oil Declines | Closing Bell
top_signals.summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Lisa Mateo. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix Is Said to Price US Share Offering at $149 Apiece
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc. priced its US listing of American depositary receipts at $149 each, according to a person familiar with the matter who asked not to be identified as the information isn’t public.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Grayscale's CFO exits after 7 years with crypto asset manager
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Japan to test launch reusable rocket in chase with SpaceX
